## Checklist

- [ ] Edited the root `SKILL.md` / `references/` (not the generated `plugins/` copy)
- [ ] Ran `bash scripts/sync-plugin-skill.sh` and committed the regenerated plugin copy
- [ ] New patterns include a before/after example
- [ ] No private paths, names, or secrets added
